label: session-ready
context: Mention Demo session open in conductor mode — two voices ready for directed messages
narration: Here's a Mention Demo session open in conductor mode, with two AI voices ready to receive directed messages.

label: session-started
context: Mention Demo session open in conductor mode
narration: The session is live. Let's try it out.

label: input-focused
context: Message input focused, about to type @mention
narration: We'll click into the message input. From here, an at-mention lets us target a specific voice.

label: at-sign-typed
context: At-sign typed, voice picker dropdown opened
narration: Typing the at sign opens a voice picker dropdown. This is how you direct a message to one specific AI instead of broadcasting it to the whole session.

label: picker-filtered
narration: As you type, the picker filters in real time. Right now it's narrowed down to the Anthropic voice.

label: voice-selected
context: Anthropic voice selected from picker, input shows @mention tag
narration: Select it, and the mention tag appears.

label: message-composed
context: Full directed message composed targeting Anthropic
narration: Now we finish composing the message. Notice the mention tag stays inline, making it clear exactly which voice will respond. Only the targeted AI receives this prompt — the others stay silent until called on.

label: voice-responded
context: Anthropic responded to the directed question
narration: And just like that, Anthropic responds directly. The other voice stays quiet — only the mentioned mind speaks.
